328 GG0170B2_SIT_LYNG_GOAL_END_CD GG0170B2_SIT_LYNG_GOAL_END_CD GG0170B2 Discharge Goal Sit to Lying Code - The data in this column indicates the patient's discharge goal for moving from a sitting position on the side of bed to lying flat on the bed. CHAR 2 The data in this column indicates the patient's discharge goal for moving from a sitting position on the side of bed to lying flat on the bed. 01 = Dependent
02 = Substantial/maximal
